instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that renders an unordered list from a sequence `items` of strings. Escape each item for HTML output. When `items` is missing or empty, render a paragraph saying no items were found.
code:
<#-- Model: items: sequence of strings --> <#if !items?has_content>

No items were found.

<#else>
    <#list items as item>
  • ${item?html}
